name: io.github.pgalyen1987/gate402-mcp
description: Pay-per-call agent APIs over x402: web→Markdown scraping, stealth fetch, token compression, and semantic cache. Free tier, no signup.

environment_variables.name: GATE402_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Optional. A funded Gate402 account key to skip the free tier.

environment_variables.name: GATE402_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Optional. Override the gateway base URL (default https://gate402.app).
